title: Reset Drill
brief: Reorder three lines to match the expected output.
objectives: Make the file contain exactly first, second, third on separate lines.
hints: Use dd to cut a line and p to paste it below the cursor.
Target order is exactly: first, second, third (one per line).
Use u to undo mistakes. If needed, run ./stage reset for a clean file.
primary_path: Use `dd` + `p` to move `third` below the correct lines until order is first/second/third.
fallback_path: Undo with `u` whenever a line lands wrong.
If you lose track, run `./stage reset` and do one move at a time.
why_path: This stage is line reordering, so linewise actions (`dd`/`p`) are more direct than character-level edits.
pro_move: dd + p is your fastest basic line shuffling combo.
